name: Composite Blues
formula: H - W - H - H - W - W - H - H - H - W
desc: Combines major and minor pentatonic plus blue notes. Nine notes of pure blues flexibility.

name: Bebop Minor
formula: W - H - W - W - H - W - H - H
desc: Natural minor with a passing tone between 7 and octave. Charlie Parker and Art Tatum's modernized minor.

name: Persian Scale
formula: H - WH - H - H - H - WH - H
desc: Middle Eastern and classical Persian music. Haunting, complex intervals create deeply exotic color.

name: Prometheus Scale
formula: W - W - W - WH - H - W
desc: Scriabin's invention. Six notes with floating, ethereal quality. Used in film and experimental music.

name: Tritone Scale
formula: H - WH - H - H - WH - H
desc: Symmetric scale with tritone intervals. Tension and dissonance. Used in metal and dark ambient.

name: Iwato Scale
desc: Japanese pentatonic with unique leaps. Minimalist, haunting, and deeply traditional sound.

name: Kumoi Scale
desc: Japanese pentatonic with minor third leap. Soft, lyrical, and gentle character.

name: Pelog Scale
desc: Javanese and Balinese gamelan scale. Irregular intervals create microtonal complexity and beauty.

name: Egyptian Scale
desc: Also called suspended pentatonic. Five notes with ancient character. Used in world and fusion.

name: Yo Scale
desc: Japanese pentatonic variant. Major sound with open, bright character. Traditional and modern fusion use.

name: Blues Major Scale
formula: W - H - H - WH - W - WH
desc: Major pentatonic flavor with blues alterations. Combines brightness with grit. Modern blues innovation.

name: Harmonic Major
formula: W - W - H - W - H - WH - H
desc: Major scale with a flat 6th. Adds harmonic minor color to major tonality. Used in Neo-Classical.

name: Hungarian Major
formula: WH - H - W - H - W - H - W
desc: Major with raised 2nd and 4th. Angular, exotic, and dramatic. Eastern European and film music.

name: Neapolitan Major
formula: H - W - W - W - W - W - H
desc: Major scale with a flat 2nd. Dark and operatic major quality. Used in advanced harmony.

name: Leading Whole Tone
formula: W - W - W - W - W - H - H
desc: Whole tone with leading tone resolution. Dreamy but grounded. Debussy-influenced modern jazz.

name: Algerian Scale
formula: W - H - WH - H - H - WH - H
desc: Also called Hejaz or Arabic scale variant. Eight-note variant with North African and Middle Eastern color.

name: Istrian Scale
formula: H - W - H - W - H - rest
desc: Ultra-rare six-note scale. Used in avant-garde and experimental music. Symmetrical and dissonant.

name: Dominant Diminished
formula: H - W - H - W - H - W - W - H
desc: Half-whole diminished from the dominant. Eight-note symmetrical scale used in dominant alterations.
